arts.ttl: Sheffield Wednesday boss Danny Rohl highlights two Hull City heroes in Owls defeat
arts.sum: City goalkeeper Ivor Pandur didn't have a huge amount to do with Wednesday, only mustering four efforts on target in the game, but two of them were especially good with the Croatian denying Josh Windass early in the second half and then Dominic Iorfa after Hughes' powerful header, but his performance caught the eye of the beleaguered German, who was impressed by his own side's showing against a backdrop of more off-field chaos. Sheffield Wednesday chief Danny Rohl admits he was impressed by Charlie Hughes' winning goal and the performance of goalkeeper Ivor Pandur.

arts.ttl: Matchwinner Charlie Hughes picks out key Hull City performer as he targets Watford success
arts.sum: Charlie Hughes was full of praise for goalkeeper Ivor Pandur after the Hull City goalkeeper played his part in helping the Tigers claim a huge 1-0 win at Sheffield Wednesday. Attention for City now turns to Tuesday night's trip to Watford, and another chance for the Tigers to win back-to-back games for just the second time this season, and really back up this result, something Hughes is desperate to see his side do.
